title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity is a tool that automates file organization and software development workflows using time-based tagging and file system automation. The tool helps developers manage GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects, reducing search time and improving development efficiency.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates Antigravity, a tool that automates file organization and software development workflows through time-based tagging and file system automation. It addresses a practical problem: managing GitHub repositories and local files spread across multiple projects, which costs developers time spent searching. The concrete takeaways cover how the tool handles files, applies workflow automation, and uses an agent to reduce search time and improve development efficiency.
